tags.label: GenerativeArtGallery — artwork2 (Crystal Growth)
tags.description: Adapted from the crystal growth simulation. Crystals spawn at random positions and grow outward at configurable rates. Each crystal has 4–10 randomly-angled facets sorted into a convex-ish polygon, rendered with 3 depth layers offset slightly for a bas-relief effect. New crystals use hue range and size settings from current synth vars.
